name: I'm on a small island
hints: A grass hut and a mountain are here. Both can be explored. Look for a crevice in the ground.
GO HUT to enter the grass hut and find items. GO MOUNTAIN to climb and find a sword. The stone tablet holds a magic word for this area.
SAY SUN (from the stone tablet) to cause an earthquake that opens a crevice. GO CREVICE leads to a dark cavern below. GO MOUNTAIN to find a sword on top.
Use SAY SUN with the stone tablet to trigger an earthquake. Then GO CREVICE to enter the underground cavern. The sword from the mountain is useful against the cyclops.
notes: Island area with grass hut and mountain. SAY SUN (magic word from stone tablet) triggers an earthquake that opens a crevice. GO CREVICE leads to the dark cavern (room 16). GO HUT for items (room 15), GO MOUNTAIN for the sword (room 17). South returns to the skeleton area (room 13).
